ksa_text: Skill in managing regulatory compliance and audit governance for data and AI systems, including compliance monitoring, regulatory requirement interpretation, audit coordination, and remediation tracking for data governance compliance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to Cloud Data Governance Lead scope — GOV-specific signals detected ("data governance", "regulatory   :compliance|requirement|obligation|framework|reporting", "compliance   :program|monitoring|assessment|audit|framework|control"). STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). Domain Data Governance (affinity 0.88) is a natural fit for this governance role. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level level.
